reforms.description: The Science, Technology and Innovation Bill reinforces a legal framework for collaborative research projects, promoting the sharing of technology between academia and businesses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating collaboration between academia and businesses enhances innovation and technology transfer.
reforms.status_evidence: The bill has been enacted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly changes the legal framework for collaborative research.
reforms.source_quote: The Science, Technology and Innovation Bill reinforces a legal framework for collaborative research projects.

reforms.description: The government introduced a new permanent contract for firms with fewer than 50 employees, providing financial incentives for hiring young unemployed individuals, including tax deductions and rebates on social security contributions. Additionally, young people below 30 can now use up to 100% of their accumulated unemployment benefits to start an enterprise, facilitating entrepreneurship among youth.
reforms.component_name: Employment Contract and Unemployment Benefits Reform
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging youth employment and entrepreneurship supports economic growth and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted and are currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms significantly enhance support for youth employment and entrepreneurship.
reforms.source_quote: Young people below 30 can now use up to 100% of their accumulated unemployment benefits if they opt to capitalise their benefits to start an enterprise.

reforms.description: The government is planning to reform the vocational education system to better align it with labor market needs, including extending training contracts to a maximum of three years and ensuring that training is certified as part of educational qualifications.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Aligning vocational education with labor market needs enhances the skills of the workforce, supporting innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in vocational education policy.
reforms.source_quote: The government is planning to reform the current vocational education system.

reforms.description: The 2012 labour market reform allows companies to reach firm-level collective agreements, enhancing flexibility in employment conditions and enabling firms to opt-out from sector-level agreements.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing flexibility in employment conditions can lead to increased productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly alters the framework for labor market agreements.
reforms.source_quote: The 2012 labour market reform allows companies to reach firm-level collective agreements, removing the restrictions that sector-level bargaining could impose on such agreements.
